prompt: A luxury commercial product photography shot featuring a sleek matte emerald green glass bottle with a tall cylindrical neck, rounded shoulders, and a premium brushed gold cap. The fictional brand name VERDARA is elegantly printed in embossed gold typography with a minimalist botanical emblem. The bottle is centered against a rich emerald green textured paper backdrop. The paper is dramatically torn open across the middle, revealing an overflowing bed of fresh green grapes, sliced kiwi, mint leaves, and sparkling lime wedges hidden beneath. A curled section of torn paper on the lower left adds depth and realism. Several fruits are scattered naturally across the foreground. Elegant editorial typography appears in the upper left: “Sip Into Pure Freshness” “Sip" in modern handwritten brush script, “Into Pure Freshness” in sophisticated high-fashion serif typography. The bottle label features premium botanical illustrations of kiwi, grapes, mint, and lime with subtle metallic foil accents. Hyper-realistic glass reflections, natural condensation droplets, premium studio lighting, soft shadows, vibrant colors, razor-sharp focus, luxury beverage advertisement, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, award-winning commercial product photography, minimalist composition, 8K.
promptEn: A luxury commercial product photography shot featuring a sleek matte emerald green glass bottle with a tall cylindrical neck, rounded shoulders, and a premium brushed gold cap. The fictional brand name VERDARA is elegantly printed in embossed gold typography with a minimalist botanical emblem. The bottle is centered against a rich emerald green textured paper backdrop. The paper is dramatically torn open across the middle, revealing an overflowing bed of fresh green grapes, sliced kiwi, mint leaves, and sparkling lime wedges hidden beneath. A curled section of torn paper on the lower left adds depth and realism. Several fruits are scattered naturally across the foreground. Elegant editorial typography appears in the upper left: “Sip Into Pure Freshness” “Sip" in modern handwritten brush script, “Into Pure Freshness” in sophisticated high-fashion serif typography. The bottle label features premium botanical illustrations of kiwi, grapes, mint, and lime with subtle metallic foil accents. Hyper-realistic glass reflections, natural condensation droplets, premium studio lighting, soft shadows, vibrant colors, razor-sharp focus, luxury beverage advertisement, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, award-winning commercial product photography, minimalist composition, 8K.
promptZh: 一张奢华的商业产品摄影照片，主体为一个时尚的 哑光祖母绿 玻璃瓶，瓶身带有细长的圆柱形瓶颈、圆润的肩部以及优质的拉丝金瓶盖。虚构品牌名称 VERDARA 以优雅的浮雕金色字体印制，并配有极简主义的植物徽标。瓶子居中放置在浓郁的祖母绿纹理纸背景前。纸张从中间戏剧性地撕开，露出下方溢出的新鲜青葡萄、猕猴桃切片、薄荷叶和闪亮的青柠角。左下角卷曲的撕裂纸张增加了深度和真实感。前景中自然散落着几颗水果。左上角呈现优雅的编辑排版：“Sip Into Pure Freshness”，其中“Sip”采用现代手写笔刷字体，“Into Pure Freshness”采用精致的高级时尚衬线字体。瓶身标签具有猕猴桃、葡萄、薄荷和青柠的优质植物插图，并带有微妙的金属箔点缀。超逼真的玻璃反射、自然的冷凝水珠、高级摄影棚灯光、柔和的阴影、鲜艳的色彩、锐利的焦点、奢华饮品广告、照片级真实感、超精细、屡获殊荣的商业产品摄影、极简主义构图、8K。
